title: CooperativeCoding Edge Metadata
description: JSON Schema for validating the ccoding metadata object on a JSON Canvas edge.

relation.description: Semantic relationship type. Determines sync mapping and visual rendering.

oneOf.description: Core relations — MUST be supported by all implementations.

status.description: Lifecycle status governing sync behavior. Defaults to 'accepted' if omitted.

proposedBy.description: Who proposed this element. MUST be set when status is 'proposed'.

proposalRationale.description: Free-text explanation for the proposal. SHOULD be present when proposedBy is 'agent'.
